title: Pickaxable Glass
description: Makes glass break faster with a pick.
body:
Lady's and gents and all you goblins the in backstage. 
End has done it again.
Ender has created a marvelous and completely unique pack that...
Lets you break glass whit a pickaxe faster.
WoW so fascinating almost like this should be in vanilla.
No. You still need silk touch. It's just faster.


I do know this is not very original I just wanted to make it.
